author: kṛṣṇa⋅dāsa
verses:
vande gurunīśabhaktānīśamīśāvatārakān
tatprakāśāṁśca tacchaktīḥ kṛṣṇacaitanyasaṁjñakam

mantraguru āra jata śikṣāgurugaṇa
tā̐hāra caraṇa āge kariye vandana

śrī⋅rūpa sanātana bhaṭṭa⋅raghunātha
śrī-jīva gopāla-bhaṭṭa dāsa⋅raghunātha

ei chayaguru śikṣāguru je āmāra
tā̐’ sabāra pāda-padme koṭi namaskāra

bhagavānera bhakta jata śrīvāsa pradhāna
tā̐hāra caraṇa-padme sahasra praṇāma

advaita⋅ācārya prabhura aṁśa avatāra
tā̐’ra pāda-padme koṭi praṇati āmāra

nityānandarāya prabhura svarūpaprakāśa
tā̐’ra pāda-padma vando jā̐’ra muñi dāsa

gadādhara paṇḍitādi prabhura nijaśakti
tā̐’ sabāra caraṇe mora sahasra praṇati

śrī⋅kṛṣṇacaitanya prabhu svayaṁ bhagavān
tā̐hāra padāravinde ananta praṇāma
en_translation:
I offer my respectful obeisances to the spiritual masters, the devotees of the Lord, the Lord Himself, His incarnations, His manifestations, and His potencies, all of whom are known as Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya.

I first offer my obeisances to the feet of my initiating spiritual master and all my instructing spiritual masters.

Śrīla Rūpa Gosvāmī, Śrīla Sanātana Gosvāmī, Śrīla Raghunātha Bhaṭṭa Gosvāmī, Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī, Śrīla Gopāla Bhaṭṭa Gosvāmī, and Śrīla Raghunātha Dāsa Gosvāmī—these six are my instructing spiritual masters.

To the lotus feet of all of them, I offer millions of obeisances.

To all the devotees of the Supreme Lord, headed by Śrīvāsa Paṇḍita—I offer a thousand obeisances to their lotus feet.

Advaita Ācārya is the Lord's plenary portion incarnation; to His lotus feet, I offer millions of obeisances.

Lord Nityānanda Rāya is the Lord's own manifested form; I offer obeisances to His lotus feet, of which I am a servant.

Gadādhara Paṇḍita and the other associates are the Lord's personal potencies; at the feet of all of them, I offer a thousand obeisances.

Lord Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya is the Supreme Personality of Godhead Himself; at His lotus feet, I offer unlimited obeisances.
